sentences.arabic: طَلَبَتِ الْأُمُّ مِنِ ابْنِهَا أَنْ يُحْضِرَ الْخُبْزَ.
sentences.translation: Majka je zamolila sina da donese hljeb.
sentences.translationEn: The mother asked her son to bring the bread.

sentences.translation: Dječak je otišao do obližnje pekare.
sentences.translationEn: The boy went to the nearby bakery.

sentences.translation: Kupio je svježu vijenac hljeba i brzo se vratio.
sentences.translationEn: He bought a fresh loaf and returned quickly.

sentences.arabic: شَكَرَتْهُ أُمُّهُ وَقَطَعَتِ الْخُبْزَ عَلَى الطَّاوِلَةِ.
sentences.translation: Majka mu je zahvalila i narezala hljeb na stolu.
sentences.translationEn: His mother thanked him and sliced the bread on the table.
